name: Phase 2: Validate main.py on save
description: When main.py is saved, audit CLI flags, confirmation gate, print functions, and mock mode.

action.message:
main.py was just saved in phase-2-strands-robots-deepracer. Please audit:

1. CLI FLAGS — confirm --mock uses create_policy('mock') and --model overrides the model ID.
2. CONFIRMATION GATE — confirm user must type 'y' or 'yes' to execute. Any other input must cancel. KeyboardInterrupt and EOFError during confirmation must print 'Cancelled' and continue the loop.
3. MOCK MODE — confirm mock mode shows '[MOCK — no Bedrock / no hardware]' in welcome screen and calls policy.plan() not plan_navigation().
4. validate_plan() CALLED — confirm validate_plan() is called after policy.plan() in mock mode (MockPolicy skips it internally).
5. print_patterns() — confirm all 15 patterns are listed.
6. print_physics() — confirm rotation calibration table is present (1.5s≈90°, formula, full table).
7. print_results() ICONS — confirm ✓ for ok, ✗ for failed, ⚡ for emergency steps.
8. ERROR HANDLING — confirm planning exceptions are caught and printed, REPL continues. Execution exceptions are caught and printed, REPL continues.

Report any violations.
